sprite.name: ${name}Border
sprite.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(64,64,64,255) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(228, 18, 21, 255) : (btn_hovered ? color(255, 255, 255, 255) : color(255, 255, 255, 255) ) ) }

sprite.name: ${name}Border
sprite.color: {% !btn_enabled ? color(64,64,64,255) : (defined('btn_selected') and btn_selected ? color(228, 18, 21, 255) : (btn_hovered ? color(255, 255, 255, 255) : color(255, 255, 255, 255) ) ) }
